zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam De Bostock於1325年出生在英國英格蘭爾亨波瑞時，他的父親Sir William James Bostock16歲，母親Alice Maude Moulton13歲。他於大約1349年與Margaret Whetenhall在英國爾保斯托結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1374年6月2日在英國英格蘭爾保斯托享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam De Bostock于1325年出生在英国英格兰爾亨波瑞时，他的父亲Sir William James Bostock16岁，母亲Alice Maude Moulton13岁。他于大约1349年与Margaret Whetenhall在英国爾保斯托结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1374年6月2日在英国英格兰爾保斯托享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam De Bostock was born in 1325, in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William James Bostock, was 16 and his mother, Alice Maude Moulton, was 13. He married Margaret Whetenhall about 1349, in Bostock, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 2 June 1374, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam De Bostock est né en 1325, à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William James Bostock, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Alice Maude Moulton, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Whetenhall environ 1349, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 juin 1374, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam De Bostock 1325 in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William James Bostock 16 und seine Mutter Alice Maude Moulton 13. Er hat um 1349 in Bostock, Cheshire, England Margaret Whetenhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Juni 1374 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Margaret Whetenhall circa 1349, nel Bostock, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 giugno 1374, nel Bostock, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ko.Newcastle,Northumberland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De Bostock(이)가 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헨버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William James Bostock(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Maude Moulton(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1349년 영국 체실르 보스톡에서 Margaret Whetenhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1374년 6월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보스톡에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam De Bostock nasceu em 1325, em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William James Bostock, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Alice Maude Moulton, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Whetenhall aproximadamente 1349, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de junho de 1374, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam De Bostock родился в 1325 г. в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William James Bostock было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Maude Moulton, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Whetenhall около 1349 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 июня 1374 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.
